---
title: "Part V — Practice & Craft"
---

*The tacit knowledge that no datasheet contains: soldering, material compatibility, systematic safety, and the lab habits that separate reproducible science from guesswork.*

| Module | Topic | Tier highlight |
|--------|-------|---------------|
| M27 | Soldering and interconnect | Alloy selection, cryo-compatible joints |
| M28 | Chemicals and materials compatibility | Solvent vs. plastics, Stycast |
| M29 | Safety, comprehensively | Electrical, laser, cryo, vacuum, chemical, RF |
| M30 | Lab craft — the meta-skills | Notebook standard, debugging methodology |
